    1. getContextActions(KeYMediator, ContextMenuKind, Object)

Interface KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu

All Known Implementing Classes:
CachingExtension, ContextMenuAdapter, ExplorationExtension, IsabelleTranslationExtension, OriginTermLabelsExt, SlicingExtension, TestExtension
Enclosing interface:
KeYGuiExtension
public static interface KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
This interface describes the UI extension for adding various context menus.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull List<Action>
    getContextActions(@NonNull KeYMediator mediator, @NonNull ContextMenuKind kind, @NonNull Object underlyingObject)
    A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

  • Method Details

    • getContextActions

      @NonNull List<Action> getContextActions(@NonNull KeYMediator mediator, @NonNull ContextMenuKind kind, @NonNull Object underlyingObject)
      A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

      Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

      Parameters:
      mediator - the window of the main menu
      kind - the type of context menu
      underlyingObject - the object for which the context menu is requested
      Returns:
      non-null, emptiable list of actions.
      See Also:
      • KeyAction
